title: VxCalSave Statement
parameters:
FileName	Specifies the file name from which the calibration data is loaded using a string expression.

The extension is .CAA.  If omitted, .CAA is automatically added.
For extensions other than .CAA, they are automatically changed to .CAA.
description: Saves the calibration data with the specified file name.  The file is saved in the current project.  If the file name is already existed, the calibration data is overwritten.
see_also:
VxCalib

VxTrans Function

VxCalDelete

VxCalInfo Statement

VxCalLoad

VxCalSave Statement Example

VxCalSave "MobileJ2.caa"
